Stub functions for font operations in testing, including getting font height and system fonts.

# Purpose
This code is a C++ header file that provides a narrow set of functions related to font management. It includes a constant definition `FONT_HEIGHT` and three functions: [`fonts_get_font_height`](<#fonts_get_font_height>), [`fonts_get_system_font`](<#fonts_get_system_font>), and [`fonts_get_system_emoji_font_for_size`](<#fonts_get_system_emoji_font_for_size>). The [`fonts_get_font_height`](<#fonts_get_font_height>) function returns a fixed font height value of 10. The [`fonts_get_system_font`](<#fonts_get_system_font>) and [`fonts_get_system_emoji_font_for_size`](<#fonts_get_system_emoji_font_for_size>) functions are placeholders that return `NULL`, indicating that they do not currently provide any font retrieval functionality. The file includes the `applib/graphics/text.h` header and the `<inttypes.h>` library, suggesting integration with a larger application or library that handles text and graphics.
# Imports and Dependencies

---
- `applib/graphics/text.h`
- `inttypes.h`
